title: デビュー戦の後に・かちてー

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... I did it! I finished my debut race!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm totally exhausted. My legs are legit swollen.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But you know...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna do even more intense training when we
get back.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I... I really do want to win.
choice_data_list: Then let's work hard and get those victories.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bet. I'm gonna win, and win, and win some more.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wanna reach the very top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Tosen Jordan and I are walking
through the entrance tunnel, when...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
And are you planning to run in any junior G1
races?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Although I'm still talking with my trainer
about exactly which race to enter.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oooh... An interview...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Has anyone offered to interview
me?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No kidding.
choice_data_list: But they're gonna start coming now!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Shut it. I don't need that kind of cringey
reassurance.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna make it big, I need to show off at
least enough skills to get the interviews flowing
in. You know, like entering G1 races and stuff.
choice_data_list: Then that can be your goal for now.
Then that can be your goal for now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: My goal? Oh right, my goal... Sure.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's not bad, I guess. So if we go with that,
which race should we aim for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan asks me to think of a potential G1
race. If we want a race where she can put her
powerful legs to good use, then...
choice_data_list: The Hopeful Stakes might be a good choice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's one of the top races of the junior year. It'll be
tough, but the other racers are all in their junior
year, same as her. Which means she has a chance.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"...this year's debut Umamusume. There's a promising...
from Hanshin..."

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Like, whoa! Jordan?! Are you reading a racing
magazine?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that normal for an Umamusume who just
debuted?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I've only ever seen you read fashion
magazines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is there something specific you're looking for?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't know if I'd say that...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's like, everyone reads this, right? Probably the
top Umamusume too. So I just figured...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I should give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's a good attitude to have.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Sick studying, Jordan! Gettin' your nerd on like a
boss!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Helios?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gimme a hug, you! ☆ You too, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Look at you, studying all serious-like! I knew you
had it in you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't embarrass me! I'm gonna die of
cringe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan's next objective is to win the
Hopeful Stakes.
